title: neotinea commutata var. angelica
intro: Neotinea commutata var. angelica, also known as the Angel Orchid, is a rare and unique orchid species within the Neotinea commutata plant. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neotinea commutata var. angelica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
